title: Create 3 congress building pixel art variants

log.context: Create 3 congress building pixel art variants

Done. The file is at `/mnt/data/hello-world/commons-vote.html` and the clunger service has been restarted.

The page is live at `clung.us/commons-vote`.

What's on the page:

- Three 160x120 canvases side by side with the same dark theme (#0d0d1a background, #e0e0ff text, #4ecca3 accent) as grazing.html.
- **Variant A (Classical Pillars):** Wide building with 4 stone columns (#7a7a9a), triangular pediment built as a pixel staircase, carved steps in 3 tiers, amber-glowing doorway, "COUNCIL" in 1p...(truncated)
